description: ProPublica COMPAS recidivism risk scores, Broward County
proposed_title: COMPAS Two-Year Recidivism by Race and Age (ProPublica 2016)
encoding_note: two_year_recid=1 counts as Success (recidivated); group by race (treatment) × age_cat (stratum: Less than 25 / 25-45 / Greater than 45); count rows per cell for Cases, sum two_year_recid for Successes.
